f1_evidence.embedder: bge-m3 1024d (pre-computed cache, same as v0.6.1 bench)
f1_evidence.fix_a_description: sparse-safe RRF (Cormack 2009): items with bm25_score>0 get RANK() over BM25-matching items; items with bm25_score=0 get sentinel=n+1 (excluded from BM25 list).
f1_evidence.v061_attempt_a_scale_regression: ORDER BY rrf_diag with ROW_NUMBER() tie-break caused -22.44pp regression on same corpus. v0.6.2 sparse-safe RRF fixes the root cause: high-cosine items without BM25 match no longer rank below BM25-matching non-answers.

r1_deferred.issue: AmbiguousColumn 'role' in recall_lessons / recall_hybrid (Agency production blocker)
r1_deferred.reason: All bare 'role' references already qualified as 'al.role'; bug is PL/pgSQL variable_conflict with RETURNS TABLE OUT variable. Fix requires either '#variable_conflict use_column' directive or renaming OUT column (backward-incompat). Needs proper investigation, not shipped halfway in v0.6.2.

carry_forward_locomo: v0.6.1 LoCoMo recall@10=0.7994 baseline (carried forward; not re-run for v0.6.2 since change is recall_hybrid internal scoring, not LoCoMo-affecting)
